label: Subagent • computer_use live (model toggles a switch)
query: Open System Settings and turn on Night Shift.
notes: LIVE. The run model drives the REAL computer_use host against the in-memory ScriptedCUDriver — perception and actuation are deterministic, so a failure attributes to the model's planning/targeting/JSON-shape, not flaky AX. The cross-model planning signal: a capable model clicks Night Shift exactly once and declares done; a weaker one mistargets, types, or thrashes. Tiny-context models (Foundation, <=4K window) SKIP because the loop forces an agent_action tool call.
